text: Russia invaded Ukraine in 2022. This caused inflation to spike.
notes: Example from paper's research background - demonstrative referring to invasion event

text: tu n'es pas très intelligent. j'ai exactement la même chose chez moi.
notes: ANA refers to robot's limited intelligence as 'the same thing' she has at home - situational anaphora
translation: you are not very smart. I have exactly the same thing at home.

text: chaque joueur reçoit un certain nombre de cartes. combien?
notes: CED's clarification request refers to the unspecified quantity - elliptical anaphora
translation: every player receives a certain number of cards. how many?

text: généralement chaque joueur commence avec dix cartes. dix cartes?
notes: ADR's whispered echo-question refers to agent's claim - incredulous repetition
translation: generally every player begins with ten cards. ten cards?

text: il préfère qu'on fasse à trois. trois cartes.
notes: CED clarifies 'trois' as referring to cards, not players - disambiguation
translation: he prefers that we do it with three. three cards.

text: d'accord trois cartes chacun c'est parfait pour commencer.
notes: Agent's c'est refers to the corrected card count - propositional anaphora
translation: ok three cards each it's perfect to start with.

text: je vais vous lire le texte. okai.

antecedent.text: je vais vous lire le texte

notes: EMM's response token confirms the proposed action - stance marker to proposition
translation: I will read you the text. ok.

text: si vous avez déplacé la caméra je pourrais ne plus bien le voir. tout à fait.

antecedent.text: si vous avez déplacé la caméra je pourrais ne plus bien le voir

notes: EMM's response confirms agent's conditional statement - aligns with proposition
translation: if you have moved the camera I might not see it properly anymore. absolutely.

text: je veux pas le résumé je veux la lecture.
notes: Contrastive reference - EMM distinguishes summarizing activity from reading activity
translation: I don't want the summary I want the reading.

text: très bien je vais lire le texte en entier. voilà.

antecedent.text: je vais lire le texte en entier

notes: EMM's voilà confirms closure of request sequence - change-of-activity token
translation: I will read the text in full. there you go.
